creator: var@schellong.biz
text:
Now with BETA2 the behaviour is the same.

Each time caused by <Alt><Fx>
the command top shows:

Not displaying self.
Displaying self.
Not displaying self.
...
...

All other key pressings are okay.


-- 
Mit freundlichen Grüßen
